description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with a mix of light and dark exterior finishes. The front facade includes a spacious patio with outdoor seating, large glass sliding doors, and a wooden deck area, complemented by landscaped greenery and trees. The structure is primarily rectangular, with a combination of smooth concrete, wood, and glass materials visible on the exterior. The rear and side views reveal additional windows, a secondary entrance, and more subtle landscaping, while the overall layout emphasizes open, airy living spaces. The bungalow appears to have a single story, with a prominent overhang providing shade to the patio area. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with large panes on the front and smaller, more regularly spaced windows on the sides and back.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass doors, a wooden deck, and landscaped surroundings. The design features clean lines, mixed materials, and an open patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, wooden deck, outdoor seating, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall with minimal windows, secondary entrance, and adjacent trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying smaller windows, a simple facade, and additional landscaping elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the wooden deck, side windows, and more greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front glass doors and smaller side and rear windows
